title: oxalis serpens var. serpens
intro: Oxalis serpens var. serpens, also known as creeping wood sorrel, is a low-growing, perennial herb native to North America. It has been used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which can help to soothe digestive issues and wounds. The plant's leaves and stems contain oxalic acid and other compounds that have been shown to have health benefits, such as reducing inflammation and improving cardiovascular health. Oxalis serpens var. serpens can be used in herbal preparations, including teas, infusions, and tinctures, although it's essential to consult with a healthcare professional before using it medicinally.
